tasks.description: Create `src/demo_module.py` containing exactly `VALUE = 1` and do not modify any other source file.

stance.challenge_engaged: Keep the edit minimal and precise.
stance.angle_taken: Create one new source file only.

tasks.executor_notes: Created src/demo_module.py and verified its bytes are b'VALUE = 1\n'.
commands_run:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('src/demo_module.py')
data = p.read_bytes()
print(repr(data))
print(data == b'VALUE = 1\n')
PY
